name: facebook_events_scraper
title: Facebook Events Scraper
description: Search indexed public Facebook events, resolve an events URL, or inspect one public event without a Facebook login.

seo.title: Facebook Events Search and Details API
seo.description: Find indexed public Facebook events and resolve public event metadata through Better Fetch.
seo.intro: Facebook Events Scraper combines transparent search-index discovery with direct public event-page metadata. It returns source URLs, stable event IDs, titles, visible descriptions, location, organizer, date labels, and event images when Facebook exposes them.

useCases.title: Local event discovery
useCases.description: Find public Facebook events by city, theme, venue, or date phrase.

useCases.title: Event verification
useCases.description: Resolve a known event URL or numeric ID to its current public title, description, and image.

useCases.title: Community monitoring
useCases.description: Track source-linked public event listings without storing Facebook credentials.

faqs.question: Does this require Facebook login?
faqs.answer: No. Search uses Google's public index and details use Facebook's public Open Graph metadata.

faqs.question: Is event search complete?
faqs.answer: No. Search coverage depends on public indexing and is explicitly best-effort.

faqs.question: Can it read private events?
faqs.answer: No. It only returns event data exposed on public Facebook and search-index surfaces.

mode.description: Search by phrase, resolve an events URL, or inspect one event.

url.description: Facebook events search/Page URL or individual event URL.

id.description: Numeric Facebook event id for details mode.

time.description: Optional time phrase retained for competitor-compatible inputs.

cursor.description: Google result offset from a previous response.

description.description: Visible indexed or Open Graph description.
